target_audience: Local service businesses (dentists, HVAC, salons, home services)
market_position: Value-focused alternative to Birdeye and Podium with simpler setup and strong automation
competitive_landscape_summary: Competitors charge between $79 and $149 per month for similar review and messaging features.
desired_outcome: Increase conversion and average order value via clear tiering, ethical scarcity, and strong ROI framing.

constraints.capacity: We can onboard up to 25 growth-tier customers per month due to support bandwidth.

notes: Primary buyers are owners and office managers; price sensitivity is moderate when ROI is demonstrated.
